page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7.32xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 128 dedicated physical cores using Intel Xeon 8369B processors operating at a base frequency of 2.7 GHz. With a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, each of the 128 vCPUs maps directly to a dedicated physical core, eliminating resource contention from hyperthreading.

The instance is equipped with 512.0 GB of system memory, maintaining a balanced ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or integrated GPU hardware, meaning all storage requirements must be met via external network-attached block storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 64 Gbps.

From a resource density perspective, the ecs.g7.32xlarge offers a high-density compute profile within the general-purpose class. The lack of bundled local storage and GPU accelerators represents a clear tradeoff, positioning this instance for workloads that rely on external storage volumes and CPU-bound processing. The dedicated core allocation ensures predictable execution times, which can improve cost-efficiency for sustained, high-throughput workloads compared to shared-core or hyperthreaded alternatives.

This hardware configuration is suitable for enterprise applications, large-scale web serving, database hosting, and distributed middleware. The combination of 128 dedicated cores and 512 GB of RAM supports multi-threaded application servers, container orchestration nodes, and general-purpose enterprise workloads requiring high network throughput and memory capacity.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7.32xlarge is a general-purpose instance built on the KVM hypervisor and x86_64 architecture. It is powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz, delivering 128 dedicated physical cores with a single thread per core configuration. The instance features 512.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, requiring external network-attached storage. Network performance is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 64 Gbps. This resource profile is designed for enterprise applications, large-scale web serving, and database workloads that require high-density dedicated compute resources and substantial network throughput without the need for local NVMe drives or hardware acceleration.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7.32xlarge is an x86_64 server featuring 128 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 512 GB RAM, and 64 Gbps network bandwidth, optimized for enterprise workloads without local storage.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7.32xlarge features 128 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 512 GB RAM, and 64 Gbps bandwidth for general-purpose enterprise workloads.
tagline: A high-density dedicated core instance featuring a balanced memory-to-CPU ratio and high-speed network connectivity for enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 128 dedicated physical Intel Xeon 8369B cores at 2.7 GHz
512 GB of system memory with a balanced 4 GB per core ratio
64 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for high-throughput data transfer
No local storage or GPU accelerators included
Suited for enterprise applications, database hosting, and container nodes
